Notice Of Motion By Judgment Creditor That A Writ Of Execution Be Issued In The Name Of Both The Judgment Debtor And His Spouse

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Beronio Lumber Company's motion to issue writ of execution in the name of both the judgment debtor and his spouse is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
